name: YouTube to Notion Guide Generator
description: Turn YouTube videos into structured Notion pages with AI-generated guides.

NOTION_API_KEY.description: Secret token for Notion integration. Get it from https://www.notion.so/my-integrations.

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: (Optional) API key for OpenRouter. Required if LLM_PROVIDER is openrouter. Get it from https://openrouter.ai/.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: (Optional) API key for Google Gemini. Required if LLM_PROVIDER is gemini. Get it from Google AI Studio.

NOTION_DATABASE_ID.description: (Optional) ID of an existing Notion database. If not provided, the app can create one.

LLM_PROVIDER.description: Default AI provider to use: 'openrouter' or 'gemini'.

OPENROUTER_MODEL.description: Specific model to use with OpenRouter (e.g., 'openai/gpt-4o-mini').

OPENROUTER_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for the OpenRouter API.

OPENROUTER_SITE_URL.description: Site URL for OpenRouter (for display purposes).

OPENROUTER_APP_NAME.description: Application name for OpenRouter (for display purposes).

GEMINI_MODEL.description: Specific model to use with Gemini (e.g., 'gemini-2.5-flash').

GEMINI_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for the Gemini API.

MAX_VIDEOS_PER_CHANNEL.description: Maximum number of videos to fetch per YouTube channel.

MAX_CONCURRENT_VIDEOS.description: Maximum number of videos to process concurrently.

MAX_TOKENS_PER_CHUNK.description: Maximum tokens per chunk when processing transcripts for LLM.

RESPONSE_MAX_TOKENS.description: Maximum tokens for the LLM's response.

REQUEST_TIMEOUT.description: Timeout in seconds for API requests.

YOUTUBE_COOKIES_FILE.description: (Optional) Path to a Netscape-format YouTube cookies.txt file available to the backend.

YOUTUBE_COOKIES.description: (Optional) Raw Netscape-format YouTube cookies.txt content. Prefer YOUTUBE_COOKIES_B64 for hosted secret managers.

YOUTUBE_COOKIES_B64.description: (Optional) Base64-encoded Netscape-format YouTube cookies.txt content for hosted deployments.

YOUTUBE_SLEEP_INTERVAL.description: Seconds to wait between YouTube requests to reduce rate-limit and bot-check pressure.

YOUTUBE_MAX_SLEEP_INTERVAL.description: Maximum randomized wait between YouTube requests.

YOUTUBE_PLAYER_CLIENTS.description: (Optional) Comma-separated yt-dlp YouTube player clients. Leave as default unless troubleshooting PO-token/client issues.

TRANSCRIPT_LANGUAGES.description: Comma-separated list of preferred transcript languages (e.g., 'en,en-US').
